# SafeNet SA: AI Summary
> The only digital safety platform built for South African families.
> Monitors WhatsApp. Speaks 11 languages. POPIA compliant.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://safenet-sa.co.za/ - Digital safety for SA families, WhatsApp monitoring, Luna AI
- Sign Up: https://safenet-sa.co.za/auth - Create account with SA phone number, POPIA consent
- Dashboard: https://safenet-sa.co.za/dashboard - Real-time monitoring dashboard for parents
- Alerts: https://safenet-sa.co.za/alerts - Security alert history and threat detection
- Location: https://safenet-sa.co.za/location - GPS tracking and geofencing
- Settings: https://safenet-sa.co.za/settings - Account, language, plan, and privacy settings

## About
SafeNet SA is a South African digital safety platform that protects children online. It monitors WhatsApp messages using on-device AI (Luna), supports all 11 official South African languages, and is fully POPIA compliant. The platform offers real-time threat detection, GPS location tracking, screen time management, app blocking, internet pause controls, and school integration features.

## Key Features
- **WhatsApp Monitoring**: On-device analysis of WhatsApp messages for phishing, grooming, and harmful content. No message content is transmitted or stored.
- **Luna AI**: Proprietary AI that detects threats in real-time. Understands South African slang and context. Sends alerts in the parent's preferred language.
- **11 Language Support**: Full support for all South African official languages including Zulu, Afrikaans, isiXhosa, Sesotho, Setswana, Sepedi, Tshivenḓa, Xitsonga, siSwati, and isiNdebele.
- **GPS Location Tracking**: Real-time location monitoring with geofencing. Receive alerts when children arrive at or leave safe zones.
- **Screen Time Management**: Daily and weekly reports on app usage. Set time limits per app or category.
- **Internet Pause**: One-tap internet pause across all connected devices.
- **Anti-Uninstall**: Device admin protection prevents children from removing the app.
- **School Shield**: Integration for schools with batch enrollment, emergency broadcasts, and curriculum mode.
- **POPIA Compliance**: Full compliance with South Africa's Protection of Personal Information Act.

## Pricing
- **Free**: Basic WhatsApp monitoring, Luna AI alerts, basic location tracking
- **Guardian (R89/month)**: Up to 4 children, all 11 languages, voice alerts, weekly digest, priority support
- **Sentinel (R149/month)**: Unlimited children, School Shield, ISP billing integration, dedicated account manager, 24/7 phone support

## External References
- BusinessTech: Phishing attacks targeting WhatsApp users in South Africa surge
- Childline South Africa: Online grooming and cyberbullying cases rise significantly
- UNICEF South Africa: 1 in 3 children in SA exposed to harmful content online
- SAPS: Rise in cybercrimes targeting minors through WhatsApp and social media
